title: Freshly Twilighted [Fresh Animations x The Twilight Forest]
description: Classic dimension mod gets a FRESH coat of paint!
body:
# This pack makes The Twilight Forest mobs use Fresh Animations'... animations.
Almost every mob was reanimated through botching of FreshLx's animation code. Some errors may occur, so feel free to dm me in discord.

You are completely free to include this resource pack in your modpack, just leave a link to either modrinth or curseforge page.

I do NOT own any piece of animation code, it was made by FreshLX. I just adapted it for The Twilight Forest mobs. 

If you liked my work, you can support me on Boosty: https://boosty.to/lil_cccarrrottt/donate ! <3

## Notes
Altering of some mobs' models requires blatant crutches, for example:
- Mooshroom's model requires ctm (for now, [Fusion](https://modrinth.com/mod/fusion-connected-textures) and [OptiFine](https://optifine.net/home)/[Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) formats are supported) and can break red mushroom's rendering with some other mods, i'll try my best to fix incompatibilities! 
- Giants mimic player's model, so any resource pack that changes it will also change them.
- Goblin Knights' armor layers are rendering strangely, but this could cause problems only if you somehow spawn them one by one.
- Knight Phantom's animations work only if he is in attacking state (e.g. his inner skeleton is visible).
- Some mobs that don't spawn as jockeys are missing riding animations. Srry i forgor about existence of boats, will fix later 💀

## To do
- Clean up code from rudimentary variables
- Bring more originality to various mobs
- Update to 1.21
- Make compatibility with the official [JAPPA Pack](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/twilight-forest-jappa-pack) addon
- Learn math lol

## Special Thanks
- Obviously to FreshLX for creating [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations), his majestic work greatly inspired me throughout almost half of a year of work on Freshly Twilighted.
- This resource pack wouldn't ever happened without Traben's babies - [Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) & [Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features), i can not be more greatful for his responsivenes and willingness to help with code!
- A whole Team Twilight, for maintaining and development of [The Twilight Forest](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-twilight-forest) - not just some old mod, but mod that is known by many older players as THE mod. Pals, I was so motivated to start this project when i saw some reddit post that unfairly called The Twilight Forest "overused" and "boring" :)
- All the beautiful people of the Traben's and Fresh's discord servers who helped and supported me with their feedback!
